subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which is the capital city of Rajasthan and what are some of its famous cities?
question_hi: राजस्थान की राजधानी और इसके पर्यावरणीय जिलों और प्राचीन कथाओं के विशेषताओं के खिलें।
explanation_en: Among the options provided, "A" covers both the capital city (Jaipur) and some famous places (Udaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, Bikaner) of Rajasthan which are also known for their rich history and culture.
